disclaimers: Incentives are shown as EV only and never included in APY.
Numeric APY is withheld when Product Read marks reasons/quality as untrusted.

activationConditions: Staking contract deployed on Plasma + audited
Merkle proof distribution pipeline operational
Staker share accounting integrated into observation sweep

incentivesEv.notes: Incentives shown as EV only; excluded from base APY.

eligibility.notes: Points accrue to any depositor with vault shares. Staking not yet required.

truthNotes: MEASURED: grossApyPct derived from onchain probe.
MEASURED: netApyPct computed by subtracting structural mgmt and perf fees.

executionFee.activationCondition: MEASURED_ONLY requires MEASURED execution loss evidence

activationConditions: Staking contract deployed on Plasma + audited
Merkle proof distribution pipeline operational
Staker share accounting integrated into observation sweep

incentivesEv.notes: Incentives are shown separately as EV-only and never blended into APY.

eligibility.notes: Points remain EV-only and are excluded from both market and product APY.

marketObserved.label: Market APY (Observed)
marketObserved.explanation: Refreshable anytime from onchain observer reads.

productRealized.label: Product APY (Realized)
productRealized.explanation: Pending first settle: deposits are queued and the current epoch has not ended yet.
